fixture.active_mode: Test-only harness mode selector: battle | neutral_transit_v1. This is the only activation switch; default should remain battle so the maintained battle path stays unchanged.

neutral_transit_v1.objective_point_xy: Single objective point as [x, y] for fixture-only objective injection. This is not canonical runtime target semantics.
neutral_transit_v1.stop_radius: Fixture-only completion radius around objective_point_xy. Simulation stops when the single fleet centroid enters this radius.
neutral_transit_v1.fleet_archetype_id: Single-fleet archetype top-level key in archetypes/archetypes_v1_5.json (or 'default').
neutral_transit_v1.fleet_size: Single-fleet initial unit count for neutral_transit_v1.
neutral_transit_v1.aspect_ratio: Single-fleet initial formation col/row ratio for neutral_transit_v1.
neutral_transit_v1.origin_xy: Single-fleet initial formation center anchor as [x, y] for neutral_transit_v1.
neutral_transit_v1.facing_angle_deg: Single-fleet initial facing angle in degrees for neutral_transit_v1. 0=+X, 90=+Y.

fleet.fleet_a_archetype_id: Fleet A archetype top-level key in archetypes/archetypes_v1_5.json (or 'default').
fleet.fleet_b_archetype_id: Fleet B archetype top-level key in archetypes/archetypes_v1_5.json (or 'default').
fleet.initial_fleet_a_size: Initial unit count for fleet A.
fleet.initial_fleet_b_size: Initial unit count for fleet B.
fleet.initial_fleet_a_aspect_ratio: Fleet A formation col/row ratio. Example: 2.0 means wider than tall. Each row is centered by its actual row size, including the final partial row.
fleet.initial_fleet_b_aspect_ratio: Fleet B formation col/row ratio. Example: 2.0 means wider than tall. Each row is centered by its actual row size, including the final partial row.
fleet.initial_fleet_a_origin_xy: Preferred Fleet A initial formation center anchor as [x, y]. If present, overrides legacy initial_fleet_a_origin_x / initial_fleet_a_origin_y.
fleet.initial_fleet_b_origin_xy: Preferred Fleet B initial formation center anchor as [x, y]. If present, overrides legacy initial_fleet_b_origin_x / initial_fleet_b_origin_y.
fleet.initial_fleet_a_origin_x: Fleet A initial formation center anchor X coordinate.
fleet.initial_fleet_a_origin_y: Fleet A initial formation center anchor Y coordinate.
fleet.initial_fleet_b_origin_x: Fleet B initial formation center anchor X coordinate.
fleet.initial_fleet_b_origin_y: Fleet B initial formation center anchor Y coordinate.
fleet.initial_fleet_a_facing_angle_deg: Fleet A initial facing angle in degrees. 0=+X, 90=+Y.
fleet.initial_fleet_b_facing_angle_deg: Fleet B initial facing angle in degrees. 0=+X, 90=+Y.

visualization.display_language: Label language for plot names: 'EN' or 'ZH'.
visualization.animate: Enable battlefield animation and frame capture.
visualization.plot_profile: Plot selector: auto | baseline | extended. auto follows the effective cohesion source: v3_test => v3 plots, v2 => v2 plots. Explicit extended is only valid when the effective source is v3_test.
visualization.auto_zoom_2d: Auto zoom battlefield view during animation (update every 50 ticks; true/false).
visualization.vector_display_mode: Unit arrow direction mode: effective=post-projection displacement; free=pre-projection composite vector; attack=current attack-target direction (fallback effective if no target); composite=angle-bisector of attack and effective (fallback effective if no target).
visualization.show_attack_target_lines: Visual-only toggle. Draw thin red lines each frame from attacker center (post-tick position) to current target center (post-tick position).
visualization.tick_plots_follow_battlefield_tick: Visual-only toggle. If true, all tick-based plots unfold progressively with Battlefield tick; if false, full trajectories are shown immediately.
visualization.plot_smoothing_ticks: Display-only smoothing window for non-Alive plots. Default 5 ticks. Raw telemetry/export values remain unchanged.
visualization.animation_play_speed: Animation playback speed multiplier. 1.0 is baseline (historical default equals 100ms/frame when interval=100).
visualization.animation_frame_interval_ms: Base animation playback interval per rendered frame in milliseconds (before play-speed multiplier).
visualization.print_tick_summary: Print per-tick summary logs to console.

metatype.settings_path: Path to metatype generation config (default: archetypes/metatype_settings.json; Yang template + runtime sampling rules; Yang is not a canonical fixed archetype).
metatype.random_seed: Random seed for metatype generation (Yang exploration commander / sampler). If omitted, falls back to run_control.random_seed. If -1, use true randomness.

selectors.movement_model: Runtime movement selector: baseline | v3a | v4a. baseline remains the maintained baseline (currently v3a). v4a is the bounded subtractive experimental line and should only be used when test_mode=2; current testonly layer may set it as the explicit test-mode default without changing the baseline.
selectors.cohesion_decision_source: Runtime cohesion decision source selector: baseline | v2 | v3_test. baseline currently resolves to v3_test @ 1.1. test_mode=0/1 remap runtime to the current baseline source; test_mode=2 permits explicit legacy selection.

test_only.expected_reference_spacing: Expected/reference formation spacing for the v4a line. This is distinct from runtime.physical.movement_low_level.min_unit_spacing, which remains the physical-layer minimum spacing.
test_only.reference_layout_mode: Reference formation layout mode for the v4a line. Supported values are rect_centered_1.0 and rect_centered_4.0. This target reference aspect is distinct from the fleet's initial spawned aspect ratio.
test_only.reference_surface_mode: Reference-surface generator mode for the v4a line. rigid_slots preserves the current exact dead-slot continuation read; soft_morphology_v1 switches to the bounded planar soft-morphology carrier.
test_only.soft_morphology_relaxation: Fleet-level morphology relaxation for the soft_morphology_v1 carrier in (0.0, 1.0]. Higher values contract toward the alive-ratio target envelope faster; lower values keep the morphology response softer and more continuous.
test_only.shape_vs_advance_strength: Continuous v4a transition seam in [0.0, 1.0]. Higher values reduce pure objective-chasing more aggressively when morphology error is large, leaving more movement budget for shape transition before arrival/hold.
test_only.heading_relaxation: Continuous v4a heading-realization seam in (0.0, 1.0]. Higher values let the fleet heading follow desired target direction faster; lower values keep heading change more inertial and reduce abrupt transition pivots.
test_only.battle_standoff_self_extent_weight: Fleet-level battle standoff seam for v4a. Multiplies own current forward formation extent when building desired engagement distance d* on top of attack_range.
test_only.battle_standoff_enemy_extent_weight: Fleet-level battle standoff seam for v4a. Multiplies enemy current forward formation extent when building desired engagement distance d* on top of attack_range.
test_only.battle_standoff_hold_band_ratio: Fleet-level battle standoff hold-band ratio in [0.0, 1.0]. Sets the width of the near-d* no-chase band as a fraction of attack_range.
test_only.engaged_speed_scale: Unit-level engaged speed envelope in (0.0, 1.0]. Even forward-attacking engaged units move at this fraction or below of their transition-allowed speed.
test_only.attack_speed_lateral_scale: Directional movement allowance for engaged units whose attack direction is lateral to their current orientation. Forward attack interpolates from this value up toward 1.0.
test_only.attack_speed_backward_scale: Directional movement allowance for engaged units whose attack direction is backward relative to their current orientation. Must be <= attack_speed_lateral_scale.
test_only.restore_strength: Continuous v4a test-only restore-strength scale in [0.0, 1.0]. 1.0 keeps the current full bridge strength; smaller values weaken the current bounded restore response without opening a new public parameter surface.

test_only.experiment: v3a experiment selector: base | exp_precontact_centroid_probe. This test-only subtree belongs in the layered testonly settings surface, not the normal runtime layer.
test_only.centroid_probe_scale: Centroid probe scale in [0.0,1.0]. Effective only when experiment=exp_precontact_centroid_probe. v4a currently reuses this direct-cohesion probe unchanged.
test_only.pre_tl_target_substrate: Pre-TL fleet-level enemy-reference substrate used by test_run target evaluation. Supported end-state set: nearest5_centroid (default), soft_local_weighted, soft_local_weighted_tight, weighted_local, local_cluster. This remains harness/test-only.
test_only.symmetric_movement_sync_enabled: Test-run harness-side symmetric movement merge. true removes cross-fleet sequential-update bias without modifying frozen runtime.

odw_posture_bias.enabled: Enable bounded ODW posture-bias prototype inside v3a parallel/lateral pressure redistribution. v4a subtractive validation intentionally ignores this branch.
odw_posture_bias.k: Prototype ODW posture-bias gain. Recommended bounded exploration range: 0.2..0.4. Effective only when enabled=true and movement_model=v3a.
odw_posture_bias.clip_delta: Single clip half-width around 1.0 for ODW parallel-pressure scaling. 0.2 means clip to [0.8,1.2]; 1.0 means clip to [0.0,2.0]. Effective only when enabled=true and movement_model=v3a.

collapse_signal.v3_connect_radius_multiplier: Semantic connectivity-radius multiplier for runtime source v3_test. Current baseline-confirmed working value is 1.1.
collapse_signal.v3_r_ref_radius_multiplier: Scale-reference multiplier for runtime source v3_test. Keep at 1.0 unless a dedicated semantics review explicitly opens this second-stage variable.

boundary.enabled: Enable boundary soft mechanism master switch. false=soft/hard both OFF. true=soft ON and hard follows hard_enabled.
boundary.soft_strength: Boundary soft-force strength multiplier. 0.0 disables soft push while enabled=true; 1.0 keeps current baseline.
boundary.hard_enabled: Enable hard boundary clamp only when enabled=true. true=hard clamp ON; false=soft-only boundary mode.

movement_low_level.min_unit_spacing: Physical-layer minimum spacing used by local separation / projection / related low-level runtime behavior. This is distinct from any v4a test-only expected/reference formation spacing candidate.
movement_low_level.alpha_sep: Soft-separation / boundary contribution weight inside movement composition. Current default=0.6. Runtime clamps to >=0.0.

fire_control.fire_quality_alpha: Directional fire-quality coefficient alpha. 0.0 disables directional effect; 0.1 is current recommended default.
fire_control.alpha_safe_max: Documented safe upper bound for fire_quality_alpha: 0.15 (governance note).

contact_model.contact_hysteresis_h: Contact hysteresis band ratio h. Runtime clamp is [0.0, 0.2]. h<=0 disables CH.
contact_model.fsr_strength: FSR per-tick relaxation strength. Runtime clamp is [0.0, 0.3]. fsr_strength<=0 disables FSR.

hostile_contact_impedance.active_mode: Test-only hostile contact-impedance selector: off | hybrid_v2 | intent_unified_spacing_v1.

hybrid_v2.radius_multiplier: v2 hybrid local influence radius as a multiplier of min_unit_spacing.
hybrid_v2.repulsion_max_disp_ratio: v2 hybrid-only per-tick max hostile-repulsion displacement as a ratio of min_unit_spacing.
hybrid_v2.forward_damping_strength: v2 hybrid damping fraction removable from positive forward displacement at full local hostile proximity.

intent_unified_spacing_v1.scale: Hostile occupancy / penetration-lookahead radius as a multiplier of min_unit_spacing for intent-layer penetration bias with unified final spacing resolution.
intent_unified_spacing_v1.strength: Continuous intent-layer penetration-bias strength applied before movement, with final spacing left to the unified baseline feasibility-resolution layer.

event_bridge.theta_split: Tier-2 Formation Cut bridge threshold on split_separation (Channel-T condition).
event_bridge.theta_env: Tier-2 Pocket Formation bridge threshold on angle_coverage (Channel-T condition).
event_bridge.sustain_ticks: Sustain ticks required for Tier-2 bridge events (both cut/pocket).

collapse_shadow.theta_conn_default: Fallback theta_conn default for collapse_v2_shadow when quantile threshold cannot be formed.
collapse_shadow.theta_coh_default: Fallback theta_coh default for collapse_v2_shadow when quantile threshold cannot be formed.
collapse_shadow.theta_force_default: Fallback theta_force default for collapse_v2_shadow when quantile threshold cannot be formed.
collapse_shadow.theta_attr_default: Fallback theta_attr default for collapse_v2_shadow when quantile threshold cannot be formed.
collapse_shadow.min_conditions: Collapse_v2_shadow pressure condition threshold: minimum true conditions among 4 signals.

report_inference.strategic_inflection_sustain_ticks: Sustain ticks for strategic inflection detection in BRF narrative (HP-size lead).
report_inference.tactical_swing_sustain_ticks: Sustain ticks for tactical swing clustering in BRF narrative (alive lead).
report_inference.tactical_swing_min_amplitude: Minimum absolute alive-lead amplitude for tactical swing clustering.
report_inference.tactical_swing_min_gap_ticks: Minimum tick gap used to merge nearby tactical swing crossings into one cluster.

run_control.max_time_steps: Maximum simulation ticks. If <=0, run until the first resolved stop condition (battle elimination or fixture objective arrival), then keep running for run_control.post_resolution_hold_steps more ticks, capped at 999 ticks.
run_control.post_resolution_hold_steps: Extra ticks to keep running after the first resolved stop condition. Used for both battle winner hold and neutral_transit_v1 objective-arrival hold. Must be >= 0.
run_control.random_seed: General visualization seed (non-map). If -1, use true randomness.
run_control.test_mode: Execution permission switch. 0/default: baseline runtime only. 1/observe: baseline runtime + observer/event/BRF. 2/test: explicit legacy/experimental runtime selectors permitted.

battlefield.background_map_seed: Background map seed (stars/planet/asteroid field). If -1, use true randomness.

unit.attack_range: Combat hit range (distance threshold). Phase V governance default is 5.0.
unit.damage_per_tick: Base attack damage per successful hit event.
unit.unit_max_hit_points: Initial and max HP per unit.
